feedback_excerpt:
PinCheck.lean:5:7: error: Type mismatch
  countTrue_append
has type
  ∀ (xs ys : List Bool), ys = [] → countTrue (xs ++ ys) = countTrue xs + countTrue ys
but is expected to have type
  ∀ (xs ys : List Bool), countTrue (xs ++ ys) = countTrue xs + countTrue ys
PinCheck.lean:9:2: error: Type mismatch: After simplification, term
  countTrue_append [true, false] [true]
 has type
  True
but is expected to have type
  countTrue [true, false, true] = countTrue [true, false] + countTrue [true]
PinCheck.lean:12:79: error: unsolved goals
case h
xs ys zs : List Bool
⊢ ys = []

case h
xs ys zs : List Bool
⊢ zs = []
